root_cause_identification.expected_solution: In the switch statement that converts watch events based on filter matching, the case for DELETE events (!curObjPasses && oldObjPasses) uses event.PrevObject.DeepCopyObject() which retains the previous resourceVersion. The event's actual resourceVersion should be set on the returned object. The etcd3/watcher.go and etcd/etcd_watcher.go have the correct logic. The watch cache filtering logic: case !curObjPasses && oldObjPasses: watchEvent = watch.Event{Type: watch.Deleted, Object: event.PrevObject.DeepCopyObject()} -- this sends the old object's content with the old resourceVersion. It should set the event's resourceVersion on the copy. Bug location: staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/cacher.go :: processEvent (watch cache event filtering).
evaluation_criteria: Must identify staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/cacher.go as the root cause file
Must reference function/method 'processEvent (watch cache event filtering)'
Must explain the mechanism: The watch cache filtering logic: case !curObjPasses && oldObjPasses: watchEvent = watch

error_chain_trace.expected_solution: Error chain: (1) client-go informer: Establishes namespace-scoped watch, tracks resourceVersion from events (2) API Server watch handler: Routes watch to storage cacher (3) Watch Cache (cacher.go) - processEvent: BUG: Converts Modified->Deleted event using PrevObject with stale resourceVersion (4) etcd3 storage (watcher.go): Correctly handles resourceVersion on delete events (reference implementation)
evaluation_criteria: Must trace the error chain in correct order
Must identify the buggy step at Watch Cache (cacher.go) - processEvent
Must include the entry point (client-go informer) and the failing component (etcd3 storage (watcher.go))

affected_services.expected_solution: Affected components: kube-apiserver (watch cache cacher.go); client-go informers (all controllers); Any namespace-scoped or label-filtered watch
evaluation_criteria: Must list at least 3 of the affected components/services
Must cover both implementation and reference paths (e.g. staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/cacher.go, staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/storage/etcd3/watcher.go)

remediation_proposal.expected_solution: After constructing the DELETE watch event from PrevObject.DeepCopyObject(), set the event's resourceVersion on the copied object using the versioner. This matches the existing logic in etcd3/watcher.go (lines 373-378) and etcd/etcd_watcher.go (lines 401-403).
evaluation_criteria: Must propose a fix that addresses the root cause, not just the symptom
